$comment: Packages installed into every scratch org immediately after provisioning, IN ORDER.
Copy to config/scratch-packages.json in the target repo (or point SCRATCH_PACKAGES_PATH at it).
List dependencies before dependents — installs run sequentially.
Required by default: a failed install stops the pipeline. Set "optional": true to downgrade to a warning.

Replace 04tXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX with your own subscriber package VERSION id. Find it with: sf package version list --target-dev-hub <hub> (the 'Package Version Id' / 04t column), or read it off the package install URL (...installPackage.apexp?p0=04t...).

packages.name: Your ECA package
packages.$why: Installs your External Client App package so later `sf project retrieve/deploy start` calls can authenticate against this scratch. Use YOUR org's 04t version id here.

packages.name: Example protected package
packages.$why: installationKeyEnv reads the key from an env var/secret so it is never committed.
